basics.name: GINO GABRIEL CIANCIA
basics.label: Full-Stack & AI Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Developer specialized in Node.js backend systems, AI integrations, and process automation. I build multi-agent LLM pipelines, RAG systems, REST APIs, and complete web applications. Comfortable owning projects end-to-end — from architecture to deployment — working across the stack with modern tools like Astro, React, Supabase, and vector databases. Strong track record delivering real products for real clients.

work.name: Leads-Pro — B2B Orchestration Engine
work.summary: Built a multi-agent LLM pipeline for automated lead prospecting and technical qualification. Headless web scraping, Qdrant vector database, and RLHF feedback loops. OpenAI API integration with strict JSON output and webhook-based workflow automation. Data processing pipelines combining OCR and computer vision models.

work.name: HackDental — Patient Acquisition Platform
work.summary: Server architecture with Node.js and TypeScript on top of Supabase. Third-party service integrations, data sync, and automated workflow implementation. Full frontend development and business logic (React + Tailwind CSS). Complete web platform covering patient acquisition and institutional presence.

work.name: Amateur League — Soccer League Management App
work.summary: Full-stack app to manage amateur soccer tournaments: fixtures, teams, standings, and stats. Node.js/TypeScript backend, relational database, React frontend. Mobile-first UX designed for league organizers and players.

work.name: La Promesa Deportes — Corporate Website
work.summary: Institutional website for a sportswear manufacturing company. Stack: Astro + Tailwind CSS. Dynamic product catalog via Google Sheets API. Live: la-promesa.vercel.app

work.name: AuditBot / AuditAI — Automated Bank Statement Analysis
work.summary: Backend system for automated analysis of bank statements using AI. Pipelines for financial data extraction, normalization, and validation. RAG system with vector database + integrations with AI APIs and Telegram. Microservices architecture.

awards.title: 4th place — UNGS Programming Tournament
awards.summary: Freelance experience in the Argentine tech market: scoping, budgeting, and end-to-end project delivery.
